# Muhammad Umar Malik

> Software engineer and designer helping small businesses fix websites, improve UX, generate leads, and automate repetitive work.

Muhammad Umar Malik is a full-stack software engineer and UI/UX designer based in Pakistan, working with small businesses worldwide. He specialises in diagnosing the exact digital problems that cost businesses customers and revenue, then building clean, fast, conversion-focused solutions.

## Services

- [Website Development](https://umarmalik-dev.com/services): Fast, responsive, SEO-ready websites built to earn trust and generate enquiries. Specialising in Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
- [Business Automation](https://umarmalik-dev.com/services): AI workflows, lead capture, CRM updates, dashboards, and custom integrations using n8n, Make.com, and custom APIs.
- [UI/UX Design](https://umarmalik-dev.com/services): Clean interfaces for websites, SaaS dashboards, and landing pages — designed around clarity, trust, and user action.

## Problems Solved

- Slow websites causing high bounce rates and lost customers
- Poor mobile layouts that break trust on phones and tablets
- Low lead generation from weak CTAs and unclear conversion paths
- Checkout and form friction blocking sales
- Confusing, inconsistent, or outdated UI/UX
- Manual repetitive business workflows wasting hours each week

## Process

1. **Audit** — Deep review of existing website, analytics, speed, and competitor presence.
2. **Research** — Competitor analysis, user behavior study, and market positioning.
3. **Design** — Full UI/UX in Figma for approval before any code is written.
4. **Build** — Production-grade Next.js/React development, fast and accessible.
5. **Test & Launch** — Cross-device testing, Core Web Vitals optimisation, clean handover.

## Pricing

- **Starter ($499+)** — Up to 5 pages, responsive design, basic on-page SEO, contact form, 7–10 day delivery.
- **Growth ($999+)** — Up to 10 pages, custom UI/UX, full SEO, CMS, lead forms, GA4, 14–21 day delivery.
- **Custom** — Full-stack apps, automation systems, AI integrations — scoped per project.

### Add-Ons

- Monthly Maintenance & Updates: From $100/mo
- SEO Audit & Optimisation: From $200
- AI Chatbot Integration: From $300
- Workflow Automation (n8n / Make): From $400
- Speed & Core Web Vitals Fix: From $150
- Copywriting & Content: From $100/page

## Credentials & Track Record

- 30+ projects delivered
- 20+ small businesses helped with ongoing work
- 98% client satisfaction
- 3x average performance improvement on page speed scores
- Technology stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, n8n, Make.com, OpenAI API

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How do payments work?**
50% upfront before work begins, 50% before final delivery. Larger projects can be structured across 3 milestones.

**How long does a project take?**
Starter: 7–10 days. Growth: 14–21 days. Custom projects have a defined timeline set in writing before work starts.

**Will I own the website after it's built?**
100%. You own the source code, domain, hosting account, and all credentials — no platform lock-in.

**Do you work with international clients?**
Yes. Communication via email, WhatsApp, or video call, any timezone.

**What tech stack do you use?**
Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript for frontend; Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase for backend; n8n and Make.com for automation.
